title_en: New Premier of Alberta sworn in following UCP leadership race
title_fr: Un nouveau premier ministre de l'Alberta est assermenté à la suite de la course à la direction du PCU
description_en: Danielle Smith wins the UCP leadership race on October 6, 2022 and is sworn in as Premier of Alberta on October 11, 2022. At the time of swearing-in, Smith is not a sitting Member of the Legislative Assembly — she had not won a seat in the legislature. She subsequently wins the Brooks-Medicine Hat by-election on November 22, 2022, establishing her elected mandate. The by-election result is documented in the Elections Alberta 2022 by-election report.

update_log.change: Added R-108 (Elections Alberta 2022 by-election report). Description updated to note Smith was not a sitting MLA at swearing-in and won Brooks-Medicine Hat by-election November 22, 2022.
